ℹ️ Overview ▾
About
Elite Sports Complex is a state-of-the-art multi-sport facility featuring world-class courts, an Olympic-size swimming pool, modern gym equipment, and professional coaching staff. Whether you're a casual player or a competitive athlete, our facility has everything you need to train, compete, and enjoy your favorite sport. Our facility spans over 45,000 sq ft and includes 12 courts across multiple sports, a fully-equipped fitness center...
Read more

Ahmed K.
3 days ago
★★★★★
Incredible facility! The basketball courts are well-maintained and the staff is very friendly. Highly recommend for both casual and competitive play.
👍 12 found this helpful
Sara M.
1 week ago
★★★★☆
Great swimming pool and gym area. The only downside is it gets crowded on weekends. Otherwise perfect for regular training.
👍 8 found this helpful
Mohammed A.
2 weeks ago
★★★★★
Best sports complex in the city. Clean, modern, and has everything you need. The cafe is a nice touch after a workout.

📋 Policies ▾
⚠️ Free cancellation up to 24 hours before your booking. Cancellations made within 24 hours will incur a 50% charge. No-shows will be charged the full booking amount.
